use_cases: Display feature cards with icons and 3D hover perspective transforms
Showcase product cards with gradient backgrounds and interactive animations
Build interactive dashboard elements with mouse-tracking effects
Create service or benefit cards with premium variants
Display user testimonials or profile cards with 3D depth effects
ai_summary: A highly interactive 3D animated card component featuring mouse-tracking perspective transforms that rotate cards based on cursor position. Supports multiple themes (8 gradient color schemes), three size variants (sm/md/lg), and three style variants (default/minimal/premium). Built with Framer Motion for smooth animations and includes responsive grid layouts for displaying multiple cards. Perfect for showcasing features, products, or services with engaging visual effects.
